text.title: Structured Output — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: extract customer-issue entities from support emails using OpenAI response_format + Pydantic.

example.title: Entity extraction from support email
example.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel from openai import OpenAI
class SupportTicket(BaseModel): customer_email: str product_id: str severity: str # enum at the schema level issue_summary: str urgent: bool
client = OpenAI() response = client.beta.chat.completions.parse( model="gpt-4o-2024-08-06", messages=[ {"role": "system", "content": "Extract a support ticket from the email."}, {"role": "user", "content": email_body}, ], response_format=SupportTicket, ) ticket: SupportTicket = response.choices[0].message.parsed
example.note: Demonstrates r1 (provider-native), r2 (pydantic-validated). 99%+ first-call parse rate.

example.title: Safe-parse with one-shot repair
example.note: Demonstrates r3 (one repair only), r4 (log raw on second failure).
